key_overrides: ROFR: CFA has 60-day right of first refusal to purchase franchise interest (not in base FA)
Integration clause: California Franchise Relations Act and Investment Law provisions apply
No disclaimer of FTC representations
Hawaii franchise investment law provisions apply
Illinois Franchise Disclosure Act provisions apply
Jurisdiction/venue may include Illinois
Indiana Franchise Act provisions apply
Maryland Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law applies
May require fee deferral
Minnesota franchise law provisions apply
Noncompete restrictions may be limited
New York franchise law provisions apply
North Dakota franchise law provisions apply
Noncompete may be unenforceable
Workers comp must be from state fund
Rhode Island franchise law provisions apply
South Dakota franchise law provisions apply
Virginia Retail Franchising Act provisions apply
Washington Franchise Investment Protection Act provisions apply
Workers comp must be from state fund
Wisconsin Fair Dealership Law provisions apply

common_override_themes: State franchise laws may override choice of law (Georgia) and venue (Atlanta) provisions
Noncompete restrictions may be limited or unenforceable in certain states (e.g., California, North Dakota)
Integration/merger clauses may not disclaim state law protections
Termination and non-renewal provisions subject to state good cause requirements
Fee deferral may be required in certain states (e.g., Maryland)
